title: ジャパンダートダービーの後に・スキ！

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wheeeew!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I... I ran... and danced my heart out!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks... Wobble...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm f-fine, just... letting the tension out!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I guess I was a little too wound up. But can you
blame me?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Everyone really brought the heat!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I could feel them chipping away at my energy,
one step at a time. The more I ran, the more
desperate I became.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I held out until my body had nothing more to
give. After all, I knew that waiting for me beyond
the finish line was...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The winning concert! I got my limp body back into
gear, ready to give back to my supportive fans
with a performance of...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
"UNLIMITED IMPACT"! A song that calls for your
entire heart and soul—the real deal!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
After we finished, some racers couldn't even
stand. That's dirt racing for you...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But that's why I like it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You put everything on the line, heart beating so
fast it feels like it's shaking... everyone practically
crying out to be heard!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want more and more people to watch me on the
dirt track... and the stage I love so much!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna fill the stands at dirt races with crowds
like we saw at the Satsuko Sho!

It seems like a passion has ignited within Smart
Falcon, and her love for racing on dirt has been
reaffirmed. In which case, the natural place to go
from here is...
choice_data_list: Let's keep you at the G1 level.

text_block_list.text:
If she continues with high-profile races, her fan
base will grow in leaps and bounds. The
competition will be tough, but she has what it
takes to succeed!
choice_data_list: We'll get you to the top of dirt racing!
We'll get you to the top of dirt racing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
If I reach the top... the whole world will be
watching. I just know it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll go down in history as the top Umadol on dirt! I
can't waaait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So, what's my next race going to be?

Similar in distance to the Japan Dirt Derby, the
JBC Classic doubles as a chance to compete with
senior-year racers, the perfect race to showcase
her talent.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Classic... Mm, I like the sound of that. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll give it a go! ♪
And so, we set our sights on the JBC Classic.
